name: SAP S/4HANA Configuration
description: Ability to configure S/4HANA modules (FI, CO, MM, SD) and participate in fit-to-standard workshops. Includes understanding of universal journal, embedded analytics, and Fiori launchpad setup.

name: SAP BTP Integration Development
description: Design and implement integration flows using SAP Integration Suite (Cloud Integration). Covers iFlow design, adapter configuration (SFTP, HTTP, OData, IDOC), error handling, and monitoring via Operations Cockpit.

name: Change Management and Adoption
description: Application of structured change management frameworks (Prosci ADKAR, Kotter) to SAP transformation programs. Includes stakeholder mapping, resistance management, and adoption KPI tracking.

name: Generative AI and Prompt Engineering
description: Design and evaluate prompts for large language models in enterprise SAP contexts. Covers RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) patterns, grounding techniques, hallucination mitigation, and responsible AI principles aligned with SAP AI Ethics guidelines.
